ElementDescription: The NDAR Global Unique Identifier (GUID) for research subject
Subject ID how it's defined in lab/project
Date on which the interview/genetic test/sampling/imaging/biospecimen was completed. MM/DD/YYYY
Age in months at the time of the interview/test/sampling/imaging.
Notes: Age is rounded to chronological month. If the research participant is 15-days-old at time of interview, the appropriate value would be 0 months. If the participant is 16-days-old, the value would be 1 month.

ElementDescription: Sex of subject at birth
Notes: M = Male; F = Female; O=Other; NR = Not reported

ElementDescription: Date and time intervention scheduled (1st time)
Did the intervention take place at this date/time (1st time)?
Did the intervention take place at this date/time (1st time) - Why not?
Was the intervention rescheduled? (1st reschedule)
Date and Time Intervention Rescheduled (1st reschedule)
Did the intervention take place at this date/time (1st reschedule)?
Did the intervention take place at this date/time (1st reschedule) - Why not?
Was the intervention rescheduled? (2nd reschedule)
Date and time intervention rescheduled (2nd reschedule)
Did the intervention take place at this date/time (2nd reschedule)?
Did the intervention take place at this date/time (2nd reschedule) - Why not?
Date Intervention Happened
Total length of Intervention (minutes)
Any steps missed on checklist?
What steps missed on checklist? Record any defined intervention steps missed during intervention
Reason for missed steps
Any safety events?
What safety events? Record any defined safety events during intervention
What was the gestational age (GA) of baby (in completed weeks) at time of intervention?
